de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util

Class SymbolicExecutionUtil.FindModalityWithSymbolicExecutionLabelId

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.DefaultVisitor
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util.SymbolicExecutionUtil.FindModalityWithSymbolicExecutionLabelId
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Visitor
    Enclosing class:
    SymbolicExecutionUtil

    private static final class SymbolicExecutionUtil.FindModalityWithSymbolicExecutionLabelId
extends DefaultVisitor
    Utility class used to find the maximal modality Term used by SymbolicExecutionUtil.findModalityWithMaxSymbolicExecutionLabelId(Term).
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

      Modifier and Type Field and Description

    • Method Detail

      • visit

        public void visit(Term visited)
        the entry method for the visitor pattern
        Parameters:
        visited - the Term to be visited

      • subtreeEntered

        public void subtreeEntered(Term subtreeRoot)
        this method is called in execPreOrder and execPostOrder in class Term when entering the subtree rooted in the term subtreeRoot. Default implementation is to do nothing. Subclasses can override this method when the visitor behaviour depends on informations bound to subtrees.
        Specified by:
        subtreeEntered in interface Visitor
        Overrides:
        subtreeEntered in class DefaultVisitor
        Parameters:
        subtreeRoot - root of the subtree which the visitor enters.

      • subtreeLeft

        public void subtreeLeft(Term subtreeRoot)
        this method is called in execPreOrder and execPostOrder in class Term when leaving the subtree rooted in the term subtreeRoot. Default implementation is to do nothing. Subclasses can override this method when the visitor behaviour depends on informations bound to subtrees.
        Specified by:
        subtreeLeft in interface Visitor
        Overrides:
        subtreeLeft in class DefaultVisitor
        Parameters:
        subtreeRoot - root of the subtree which the visitor leaves.

      • getPosInTerm

        public PosInTerm getPosInTerm()
        Returns the modality PosInTerm with the maximal ID.
        Returns:
        The modality PosInTerm with the maximal ID.
